heading: Chief of Legislative Affairs
label: 8027 Chief of Legislative Affairs
notes: Amendments2018—, renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232, § 807(a)(1)section 5027 of this titleSubsec. (b). , substituted “section 8014(c)(1)(F)” for “section 5014(c)(1)(F)”.Pub. L. 115–232, § 809(a)2016—Subsec. (a). struck out second sentence which read as follows: “An officer assigned to that position shall be an officer in the grade of rear admiral.”Pub. L. 114–328

children.label: a
children.text: There is a Chief of Legislative Affairs in the Department of the Navy.

children.label: b
children.text: The Chief of Legislative Affairs shall perform legislative affairs functions as specified for the Office of the Secretary of the Navy by .section 8014(c)(1)(F) of this title
